summary: Full-app i18n translations testing completed. All 6 features tested and working. Language switcher successfully translates ENTIRE application (main content + sidebar), not just sidebar. Tested English, Portuguese, and Spanish translations on Login, Dashboard, and Users pages. UI Settings page loads correctly with customization options.
passed_tests: Login page displays correctly with language switcher (data-testid='language-switcher')
Login page translates to Portuguese: 'Bem-vindo de Volta', 'E-mail', 'Senha', 'Entrar'
Login page translates to Spanish: 'Bienvenido de Nuevo', 'Correo electrónico', 'Contraseña', 'Iniciar Sesión'
Dashboard page shows translated labels in Portuguese: 'Painel - Admin', 'Visão geral de todos os pedidos'
Dashboard KPI cards translate: 'Aberto', 'Em Andamento', 'Aguardando Revisão', 'Entregue', 'SLA Vencido'
Dashboard 'Recent Orders' translates to 'Pedidos Recentes', 'View All' to 'Ver Todos'
Language switcher changes translations on MAIN CONTENT, not just sidebar
Sidebar navigation translates: 'Painel', 'Central de Comando', 'Todos os Pedidos', 'Fluxos de Trabalho', 'Usuários', 'Equipes', 'Funções', 'Categorias', 'Configurações'
Users page 'Add User' button translates to 'Agregar Usuario'
Users page search placeholder translates to 'Buscar usuarios...'
UI Settings page loads at /settings with UI Customization options
UI Settings has tabs: All, Branding, Navigation, Buttons, Labels, Statuses, Messages
UI Settings shows customizable fields: app_name, app_tagline, logo_text, nav_* items
critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation using react-i18next with useTranslation hook - properly implemented in Dashboard.js and Users.js
Translation files (en.json, pt.json, es.json) are comprehensive with 375+ translation keys each
Dashboard.js uses t() function for all labels: t('dashboard.title'), t('orders.status.open'), t('dashboard.recentOrders'), etc.
Users.js uses t() function for all labels: t('users.title'), t('users.addUser'), t('users.userRole'), etc.
UISettings.js page provides admin UI customization at /settings route
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full i18n implementation verified working. Language switcher in header (compact) and login page (default) both work. Translations apply to entire app including main content areas. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**. SMTP is MOCKED.
